form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up won by 1.3 len Gowran Park in a G2 Red Mills Chase on February 14 over 3922m on heavy track defeating Sa Fureur carrying 75.5kg at $1.40 in a jumps. Second-up pulled up at Cheltenham in the G1 Ryanair (Festival Trophy) Steeplechase on March 12 over 4100m. Rates highly.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up won by 1.3 len Gowran Park in a G2 Red Mills Chase on February 14 over 3922m on heavy track defeating Sa Fureur carrying 75.5kg at $1.40 in a jumps. Second-up pulled up at Cheltenham in the G1 Ryanair (Festival Trophy) Steeplechase on March 12 over 4100m. Rates highly.

form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after three months finished second of 10 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 Cheltenham Gold Cup on March 13 over 5300m, 8 len behind Gaelic Warrior with 74.5kg at $3.80. Previously second-up came from midfield; finished fourth of 8 runners at Kempton Park in the G1 King George VI Chase on December 26 over 4800m, 0.5 len behind The Jukebox Man with 74.5kg at $3.30. Leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Second-up today. First-up after three months finished second of 10 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 Cheltenham Gold Cup on March 13 over 5300m, 8 len behind Gaelic Warrior with 74.5kg at $3.80. Previously second-up came from midfield; finished fourth of 8 runners at Kempton Park in the G1 King George VI Chase on December 26 over 4800m, 0.5 len behind The Jukebox Man with 74.5kg at $3.30. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Not raced for 54 days. Fresh up after three months finished second in a small field at Ascot in the G1 Ascot Steeple Chase on February 14 over 4200m, 1.5 len behind Jonbon with 74.5kg at $3.50. Previously second-up made ground from midfield; finished third in a small field at Ascot in the G2 1965 Chase on November 22 over 4200m, 36 len behind Jango Baie with 74.5kg at $4.50. Can go one better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Having second run back today. Not raced for 54 days. Can go one better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made a bad mistake jumping the third fence and pulled up.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming favourite; won by 4 len Windsor on January 18 over 4400m on rain affected going defeating Resplendent Grey carrying 71kg at $2 in a steeplechase. Second-up favourite; won by 8 len Kelso in a LR on February 28 over 4700m defeating Minella Drama carrying 71kg at $1.10 in a jumps. Dangerous.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Second-up favourite; won by 8 len Kelso in a LR on February 28 over 4700m defeating Minella Drama carrying 71kg at $1.10 in a jumps. Dangerous.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign winning by 0.8 len Cheltenham G2 Cotswold Chase January 24 over 5100m slow track defeating L'homme Presse carrying 71.5kg at $3.80. When resuming last campaign 9 of 14 starters at Naas in the LR November 9 over 4023m, 17 len behind Letos carrying 72kg at $2.20. Expected to challenge.
